question: Which Python keyword do you use to check a condition and decide if a block of code should run?
What is the purpose of the else statement in Python?

options.A: To run code as a backup plan when the 'if' condition is False
options.B: To delete old code from your file
options.C: To create a brand new variable
options.D: To force the computer to shut down completely

question: In Python, how do you show that a line of code belongs inside an 'if' or 'else' block?

options.A: By wrapping the line inside extra parentheses ( )
options.B: By putting a hashtag # at the start of the line
options.C: By typing the word INSIDE before the code
options.D: By indenting the line (adding spaces or pressing Tab)

question:
Look at this code:

raining = True
if raining == False:
    print("Go outside!")
else:
    print("Stay inside!")

What message will the computer display?
